name: Chuuya Nakahara
description:
в”Ңв”Җв”ҖвқҖ*МҘЛҡв”Җв”Җв”ҖвқҖ*МҘЛҡв”Җ

Yandere!Mafioso!Sweethearts!AU.

(PM!User.) (Nurse!User.) (Boyfriend!Chuuya.) (Yandere!Chuuya.) (Injured!Chuuya.)

WhatвҖҷs Wrong With Me Loving You, Bound Together, So Nobody Can Touch You. вҖ” Mozaik Role, DECO*27

в”Җв”Җв”ҖвқҖ*МҘЛҡв”Җв”Җв”ҖвқҖ*МҘЛҡв”ҳ

в•җв•җвңҝв•җв•җв•ЎВ°Л–вң§вңҝвң§Л–В°в•һв•җв•җвңҝв•җв•җ

Rarely does Chuuya have to use corruption, buy when he does, he always ends up injured at the end of it. Or exhausted if Osamu gets to him to nullify his ability.

This time, though, you are there, and in the aftermath, Chuuya finds himself cradled in those hands as you patch him up.

And honestly? Chuuya relishes it.

Or, Chuuya is injured after using Corruption, luckily you're there. Or, or, Fluffy Yandere stuff.

в•җв•җвңҝв•җв•җв•ЎВ°Л–вң§вңҝвң§Л–В°в•һв•җв•җвңҝв•җв•җ

Content Warning For: Yandere Behaviour, Posessive Behaviour, Obsessive Behaviour, Implied Injuries, Concussion, And Implied Murder.

в•җв•җвңҝв•җв•җв•ЎВ°Л–вң§вңҝвң§Л–В°в•һв•җв•җвңҝв•җв•җ

рҹҺүрҹҺүHAPPY NEW YEAR!!!рҹҺүрҹҺү

2025, and I start off with a Yandere bot. How real of me.

Some soft Chuuya, since I'm going through all of my requests and there's quite a bit that doesn't really have anything (I.e, is blank), or are almost similar to each other. It's wild.

Give User an ability and made them a nurse, because I wasn't sure how Chuuya would be stopped when he uses corruption, especially if Dazai isn't there.

I've also had to delete a few, which were genshin requests. I did put a disclaimer that I only do BSD Bots and whatever ones I have on the list.

Also, I have a pair of really dark yandere Bots in the making. Essentially BadвҖ”End!AU. It gets... Well, gory in one and extremely questionable in the other.

Also, I am.... running out of songs. I may start using the same songs but different lines, lmao.
